channel.title: SpeakForWater
channel.description: Making water resources research accessible to everyone. Join Anna and Ehsan as they discuss the latest open-access papers on hydrology, flood management, remote sensing, and water engineering — explained in plain language for farmers, water managers, and anyone who cares about water.
channel.itunes:author: Ehsan Kahrizi

item.title: Ep 12: Modeling surface water and groundwater mixing and mixing-dependent denitrification with bedform dynamics
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 12: Modeling surface water and groundwater mixing and mixing-dependent denitrification with bedform dynamics. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://hess.copernicus.org/articles/30/1221/2026/hess-30-1221-2026.pdf

item.title: Ep 11: Synergistic impact of simultaneously assimilating radar- and radiometer-based soil moisture retrievals on the performance of numerical weather prediction systems
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 11: Synergistic impact of simultaneously assimilating radar- and radiometer-based soil moisture retrievals on the performance of numerical weather prediction systems. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://hess.copernicus.org/articles/30/1261/2026/hess-30-1261-2026.pdf

item.title: Ep 10: River intermittency: mapping and upscaling of water occurrence using unmanned aerial vehicle, Random Forest and remote sensing landscape attributes
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 10: River intermittency: mapping and upscaling of water occurrence using unmanned aerial vehicle, Random Forest and remote sensing landscape attributes. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://doi.org/10.5194/hess-30-849-2026

item.title: Ep 9: Freshwater biodiversity is not adequately addressed by the current protected areas of the Caribbean biodiversity hotspot
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 9: Freshwater biodiversity is not adequately addressed by the current protected areas of the Caribbean biodiversity hotspot. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://www.biorxiv.org/content/biorxiv/early/2026/03/18/2026.03.16.712036.full.pdf

item.title: Ep 8: Encounter-state over-anchoring governs productive PETase binding on PET surfaces
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 8: Encounter-state over-anchoring governs productive PETase binding on PET surfaces. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://www.biorxiv.org/content/biorxiv/early/2026/03/18/2026.03.17.712535.full.pdf

item.title: Ep 7: Different tracer, different bias: using radon to reveal flow paths beyond the Window of Detection
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 7: Different tracer, different bias: using radon to reveal flow paths beyond the Window of Detection. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://hess.copernicus.org/articles/30/1523/2026/hess-30-1523-2026.pdf

item.title: Ep 6: From grid to ground: how well do gridded products represent soil moisture dynamics in natural ecosystems during precipitation events?
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 6: From grid to ground: how well do gridded products represent soil moisture dynamics in natural ecosystems during precipitation events?. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://hess.copernicus.org/articles/30/1813/2026/hess-30-1813-2026.pdf

item.title: Ep 5: Multi-Objective Collaborative Optimization Model and Application of the Water-Energy-Food-Carbon Nexus Under Uncertainty: A Case Study of the Heihe Irrigation Area
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 5: Multi-Objective Collaborative Optimization Model and Application of the Water-Energy-Food-Carbon Nexus Under Uncertainty: A Case Study of the Heihe Irrigation Area. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://doi.org/10.3390/w18070841

item.title: Ep 4: Persistent male survival advantage in a protogynous hermaphrodite fish
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 4: Persistent male survival advantage in a protogynous hermaphrodite fish. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://www.biorxiv.org/content/biorxiv/early/2026/04/06/2026.04.02.716101.full.pdf

item.title: Ep 3: Uncertainty-Aware Groundwater Potential Mapping in Arid Basement Terrain Using AHP and Dirichlet-Based Monte Carlo Simulation: Evidence from the Sudanese Nubian Shield
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 3: Uncertainty-Aware Groundwater Potential Mapping in Arid Basement Terrain Using AHP and Dirichlet-Based Monte Carlo Simulation: Evidence from the Sudanese Nubian Shield. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://www.mdpi.com/2073-4441/18/8/901/pdf?version=1775742205

item.title: Ep 2: From Diagnosis to Rehabilitation: A Stochastic Framework for Improving Pressurized Irrigation System Performance Under Water Scarcity
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 2: From Diagnosis to Rehabilitation: A Stochastic Framework for Improving Pressurized Irrigation System Performance Under Water Scarcity. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://www.mdpi.com/2073-4441/18/8/907/pdf?version=1775814917

item.title: Ep 1: Multiscale Pollution Risk and Mitigation Modelling to Inform Efficacy of Nature-Based Solutions
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 1: Multiscale Pollution Risk and Mitigation Modelling to Inform Efficacy of Nature-Based Solutions. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
